source_of_truth: This file documents preferred model roles. The active client or enterprise policy decides availability.
rules: Do not commit provider API keys, bearer tokens, OAuth refresh tokens, or private endpoint URLs.
Use repository configuration for model roles; do not rely on model memory for provider selection.
Use deterministic tools for verdicts, gate results, approval state, and release status.

primary_coding.purpose: Implementation, refactoring, test generation, and local reasoning.

independent_review.purpose: Adversarial review with a different model family from the primary coding pass when available.

documentation.purpose: Contributor docs, public docs-site copy, DOCX drafts, and deck drafts.

openai_codex_gpt.api_key: Set OPENAI_API_KEY or Azure OpenAI credentials in the environment or secret manager.
openai_codex_gpt.notes: Never store authorization headers in this file.

anthropic_claude.api_key: Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in the environment or secret manager.
anthropic_claude.version_header: Set the provider-required version header in the client configuration, not in committed secrets.

google_gemini.api_key: Set GEMINI_API_KEY or the enterprise-approved equivalent in the environment or secret manager.
google_gemini.notes: Use the enterprise-approved Gemini client or routing policy where available.
